name: ribrewguy-skills
description: Claude Code skills authored and maintained by ribrewguy. Each skill is designed, evaluated, and iterated with the skill-creator workflow.

plugins.name: rest-api-design
plugins.description: HTTP REST API design and review skill with a 4-case eval set covering design-from-scratch, PR audit with severity tags, payments idempotency traps, and bounded-list discipline.

plugins.name: structured-code-review
plugins.description: Rigorous, review-only code review output: source-of-truth-aware preamble, severity-tagged findings (High/Medium/Low), file:line citations, no-findings-still-formal. Composes with domain-review skills like rest-api-design.
